basic_details.job_title: Andaman and Nicobar Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 716 Depot Clerk, Storekeeper and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman and Nicobar Administration, Secretariat, Sri Vijayapuram
basic_details.post_name: Laboratory Assistant, Stenographer, Lower Division Clerk, Mechanical Foreman, Forester, Veterinary Compounder, Patwari, Soil Conservation Field Assistant, Agriculture Field Assistant, Godown Keeper, Sub-Inspector of Fisheries, Plaster Room Technician, Typist, Sales Assistant, Village Level Worker, Gram Sevika, Master 1st Class, Chief Engine Driver (SG), Master 2nd Class, Marine Radio Operator, Tally Clerk, Store Keeper, Sales Girl, Depot Clerk, Storekeeper, Weaving Instructor, Typist-Cum-Clerk, IT Analyst, Lower Grade Clerk, Stenographer (OG), Field Assistant, Computer Assistant Gr.-A' and others
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via official A&N Administration website)
basic_details.short_information: Andaman and Nicobar Administration has published the Combined Higher Secondary Level (CHSL) Recruitment Notification 2026 vide Advertisement No. 02/HSL/2026 dated June 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 716 Group B (NG) and Group C vacancies across 38 posts in various departments including Lower Grade Clerk, Stenographer (OG), Forester, Tally Clerk, IT Analyst, Marine Radio Operator, and many more. Candidates within the age range as per post-wise eligibility criteria and holding qualifications such as 10th Pass, 12th Pass, ITI, Diploma, or Graduation are eligible to apply online at erecr

important_dates.date of tbt examination (tier-i): To be intimated later through official website / SMS / E-mail

application_fee.details: Candidates (except Female/ST/Persons with Benchmark Disability candidates) are required to pay a fee of Rs. 100/- (Rupees One Hundred Only) by using Net Banking, VISA/Master/Rupay/Credit/Debit Card, UPI Payment/QR Code. The examination fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: The crucial date for determining the age limit shall be the closing date for receipt of online application i.e. 05-07-2026. The general age limit is 18-33 years for Male (Group C) and 18-38 years for Female (Group C), and 18-30 years for Group B (NG) posts. Age relaxation is admissible to ST, OBC, PwD, Ex-Servicemen, Central Government Civilian Employees, DRM and contractual employees including SSCT as per Government norms.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (05-07-2026). The qualification prescribed should have been obtained from Govt. recognized Universities/Boards/Institutions. salary_details.pay_scale: 7th CPC Pay Level-2 to Level-6 (as per post)

selection_process: Sl. No. Subject No. of Questions Maximum Marks Total Duration (General Candidates) Total Duration (Visually Handicapped / Cerebral Palsy Candidates)
I English Language (General English) 50 50 120 minutes 120 minutes + 40 minutes (compensatory time)
II General Intelligence 50 50
III Quantitative Aptitude 50 50
IV General Awareness 50 50
Total 200 200
Subject Topics

English Language (General English) Spot the Error, Fill in the Blanks, Synonyms/Homonyms, Antonyms, Spellings/Detecting Mis-spelt words, Idioms & Phrases, One word substitution, Improvement of Sentences, Active/Passive Voice of Verbs, Conversion into Direct/Indirect narration, Shuffling of Sentence parts, Shuffling of Sentences in a passage, Close Passage, Comprehension Passage.

General Intelligence Questions of both verbal and non-verbal type including: Semantic Analogy, Symbolic operations, Symbolic/Number Analogy, Trends, Figural Analogy, Space Orientation, Semantic Classification, Venn Diagrams, Symbolic/Number Classification, Drawing inferences, Figural Classification, Punched hole/pattern-folding & unfolding, Semantic Series, Figural Pattern-folding and completion, Number Series, Embedded figures, Figural Series, Critical Thinking, Problem Solving, Emotional Intelligence, Word Building, Social Intelligence, Coding and decoding, Numerical operations.

Quantitative Aptitude (a) Number Systems: Computation of Whole Number, Decimal and Fractions, Relationship between numbers. (b) Fundamental arithmetical operations: Percentages, Ratio and Proportion, Square roots, Averages, Interest (Simple and Compound), Profit and Loss, Discount, Partnership Business, Mixture and Allegation, Time and distance, Time and work. (c) Algebra: Basic algebraic identities of School Algebra and Elementary surds (simple problems) and Graphs of Linear Equations. (d) Geometry: Familiarity with elementary geometric figures and facts. (e) Mensuration: Triangle, Quadrilaterals, Regular Polygons, Circle, Right Prism, Right Circular Cone, Right Circular Cylinder, Sphere, Hemispheres, Rectangular Parallelepiped, Regular Right Pyramid with triangular or square Base. (f) Trigonometry: Trigonometric ratios, Complementary angles, Height and distances (simple problems only). (g) Statistical Charts: Use of Tables and Graphs: Histogram, Frequency polygon, Bar-diagram, Pie-chart.

General Awareness Questions designed to test the candidate's general awareness of the environment around him and its application to society. Current events and matters of everyday observation and experience. Knowledge relating to India and its neighboring countries especially pertaining to History, Culture, Geography, Economic Scene, General policy and scientific research.
Post Name Type of Test
Stenographer (all departments) Stenography/Typewriting Trade Test
Lower Division Clerk / Lower Grade Clerk / Depot Clerk / Typist-Cum-Clerk Typing Test
IT Analyst / Computer Assistant Gr.-A' Written Proficiency Test + Data Entry Speed Test (minimum 6000 key depressions per hour) + Aptitude Test
Forester Physical Standard Verification + Physical Endurance Test (25 km walk for males, 14 km walk for females in 4 hours)
Veterinary Compounder Physical Endurance Test
Tally Clerk - Shipping Service Afloat (217/26) Swimming Test + Written Test
Marine Radio Operator (216/26 & 226/26) Trade Test
Typist - Health Service Typing Test
1st Tie-Break Date of birth - the candidate older in age gets preference.
2nd Tie-Break Alphabetical order of the names taking first name into consideration.

The selection process for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026 consists of Tier-I: Online TBT (Tablet Based Test) and Tier-II: Physical Standard Examination/Physical Measurement & Endurance/Skill/Trade Test (for specific posts

qualifying in nature only). Candidates will be short-listed on the basis of their merit in the TBT Examination and post preference. Tier-II will only be of qualifying nature. No interview will be conducted. Final selection will be based on merit in TBT (Tier-I)
subject to qualifying the Skill/Trade Test (Tier-II) wherever applicable.
Tier-I: Online TBT (Tablet Based Test) - Syllabus and Exam Pattern
Note: There will be negative marking of 0.25 marks for each wrong answer. Questions in respect of subjects at Sl. No. (ii)
(iii) & (iv) will be set in English and Hindi languages only. For Visually Handicapped (VH) candidates of 40% and above visual disability opting for Scribe
there will be no component of Maps/Graphs/Diagrams/Statistical Data in the General Intelligence/General Awareness and Quantitative Aptitude paper.
Indicative Syllabus for TBT Examination
Tier-II: Physical Standard Examination / Skill / Trade Test (Qualifying Nature Only - For Specific Posts)
Wherever Physical Standard Examination/Physical Measurement & Endurance/Skill/Trade Test is prescribed as essential qualification for the post
it will be conducted by the concerned Department in respect of the successful candidates in the TBT examination
before finalizing the final merit list. The Physical Standard Examination/Physical Measurement & Endurance/Skill/Trade Test (Tier-II) will only be of qualifying in nature.
Tie-Breaking Rules
how_to_apply: Online submission of application can only be made through the official A&N Administration website at https://erecruitment.andamannicobar.gov.in from 15/06/2026 (from 12.00 Noon) up to 05/07/2026 (till 12:00 Midnight) after which the link will be disabled. No documents are to be uploaded during the time of submission of online application. No other mode of application will be accepted; applications received through post/by hand/by mail etc. will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected.

The online application consists of five sections: (1) Personal details, (2) Post selection, (3) Education Qualification details, (4) Experience (if any), (5) Payment details, and (6) Upload Photograph and Signature. Candidates must complete all six sections for the application to be treated as complete. Applications submitted partially can be completed through the recruitment portal before the last date.

Recent passport size colour photograph in jpg/jpeg format (20 KB to 50 KB; resolution 200x230; plain white or off-white background; full face, front view, eyes open; without cap, mask or glasses/spectacles)
Signature in jpeg format (10 KB to 20 KB; resolution 140x60)
Other documents such as proof of age, qualifications, category, NOC etc. should be between 100 KB to 500 KB as instructed in the online portal
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Online Document Verification (Originals + Self-Attested Copies):
ST Certificate in the prescribed format (Local A&N Islands ST only for reserved quota)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) Certificate - valid OBC-NCL certificate not older than two years from the closing date of the vacancy notice
EWS Certificate issued by the Revenue Department, A&N Administration

PwBD Certificate in the prescribed format (minimum 40% disability) issued by a Competent Authority as per form V, VI and VII of rule 18(1) under Chapter 7 of Rights of Persons with Disabilities Rules, 2017
NOC from employer (for departmental candidates working in Government Departments)
important_instructions: Online applications only - no other mode of application will be accepted; applications incomplete in any respect will be summarily rejected. No documents are to be uploaded at the time of submission of online application; candidature will be accepted only provisionally and eligibility will be verified at the time of Online Document Verification. Candidates must have their own active personal E-mail ID and Mobile Number which should be kept active throughout the entire recruitment process - admit cards, registration numbers, e-Call letters will be sent only on the registered e-mail ID. Candidates are advised to check spam/junk box for e-mails; A&N Administration will not be responsible for bouncing back of any e-mail or undelivered SMS. Candidates should apply in order of their preferences of posts; no request for change of preference of post shall be entertained at a later stage. Once the online application form is submitted, no request for change/correction/modification (including change of category) will be entertained under any circumstances. There is no provision of re-evaluation/re-checking of Answer Sheet/Scripts in respect of the TBT Examinations. For OBC-NCL candidates, the certificate must not be older than two years from the closing date of the vacancy notice. Only Local ST candidates covered under A&N Islands Scheduled Tribe Order 1959 are eligible for ST reservation; other ST candidates will be considered only for Unreserved Vacancies. Candidates found fraudulently claiming ST/OBC/EWS/ESM/PwD status shall be permanently debarred from examinations conducted by the A&N Administration. Banned items in examination hall: Mobile Phone, Micro Phone, Calculators, Digital Diary, Electronic/Smart Watch, Bluetooth devices, Book and Notes etc. are strictly prohibited. The Examination will be held at centres located at South Andaman, North & Middle Andaman and Nicobar Districts; applicants should indicate preference of zone in the online application form. No request for change of Examination Centre/zone shall be entertained later. Any further information/corrigendum/addendum shall be posted only on the official website https://erecruitment.andamannicobar.gov.in - candidates are responsible to check the website regularly. For Helpdesk: Contact [email protected] or Telephone numbers available at 03192-259200 SOVTECH from 09.00 am to 05.00 pm on all working days. Legal disputes, if any, shall be subject to Courts/tribunals having jurisdiction over the A&N Administration only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for A&N Administration Combined Higher Secondary Level Recruitment 2026 is 05 July 2026 (12:00 Midnight). The application window opens on 15 June 2026 at 12:00 Noon. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid last-minute technical issues on the official portal erecruitment.andamannicobar.gov.in.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 716 vacancies have been announced under A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026 across 38 Group B (NG) and Group C posts in various departments. The number is tentative and may increase or decrease at the sole discretion of the A&N Administration.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Male candidates from General, OBC, and EWS categories are required to pay Rs. 100/- (Rupees One Hundred Only) through Net Banking, VISA/Master/Rupay/Credit/Debit Card, or UPI Payment/QR Code. Female candidates, ST candidates, and Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) are fully exempted from payment of the examination fee. The fee once paid is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum educational qualification required for A&N Administration CHSL 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for most posts is 12th Pass (Senior Secondary Certificate - Class XII) from a recognized Board or University. However, some specialized posts require additional qualifications such as ITI/Diploma (Forester, Mechanical Foreman), specific Certificates of Competency (Master 1st Class, Chief Engine Driver, Marine Radio Operator), or Diploma in Computer Engineering (IT Analyst, Computer Assistant Gr.-A'). Candidates should check post-specific eligibility before applying.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of two tiers: Tier-I is an Online TBT (Tablet Based Test) of 200 marks covering English Language, General Intelligence, Quantitative Aptitude, and General Awareness (50 marks each, 120 minutes duration); Tier-II is a Physical Standard Examination/Skill/Trade Test applicable to specific posts only and is qualifying in nature. Final selection is based on merit in Tier-I, subject to qualifying Tier-II wherever applicable. No interview is conducted.

faq.question: Q6. Is there negative marking in the A&N Administration CHSL TBT Exam 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is negative marking of 0.25 marks for each wrong answer in the TBT (Tablet Based Test) Online Examination. Each question carries one mark. There are a total of 200 questions for 200 marks. Candidates are advised to keep this in mind while answering the questions to avoid unnecessary deductions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The general age limit is 18-30 years for Group B (NG) posts (both Male and Female) and 18-33 years for Male and 18-38 years for Female for Group C posts. Age relaxation is provided to ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), PwD (10 years for UR, 13 years for OBC, 15 years for ST), Ex-Servicemen (3 years after deducting military service), and Central Government Civilian Employees (up to 40 years) as applicable. The crucial date for age calculation is the closing date i.e. 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online only through the official A&N Administration e-recruitment portal at https://erecruitment.andamannicobar.gov.in from 15 June 2026 (12:00 Noon) to 05 July 2026 (12:00 Midnight). No offline or postal applications will be accepted. Candidates must complete all six sections of the application form including payment of fees (if applicable) for the application to be considered complete.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the A&N Administration CHSL TBT Examination 2026 be conducted?
faq.answer: The Tablet Based Test (TBT) examination will be held at designated centres located at South Andaman, North & Middle Andaman, and Nicobar Districts. Applicants must indicate their preference of zone while filling the online application form. The A&N Administration will not entertain any request for change in Examination Centre/zone at a later stage. The exact date and venue will be intimated through SMS/e-mail to registered candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the ST reservation rule for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only Local Scheduled Tribe candidates covered under the category of "Tribes" as specified under the A&N Islands Scheduled Tribe Order 1959 are eligible to apply for vacancies under the Schedule Tribe (ST) quota. Other ST candidates from outside the Union Territory of A&N Islands will be considered only for Unreserved (UR) Vacancies. Similarly, only Local OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates covered under the relevant Gazette Notification are eligible for OBC reservation.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for A&N Administration Combined Higher Secondary Level Recruitment 2026 is 05 July 2026 (12:00 Midnight). The application window opens on 15 June 2026 at 12:00 Noon. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid last-minute technical issues on the official portal erecruitment.andamannicobar.gov.in.

faq.question: How many vacancies are there in A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 716 vacancies have been announced under A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026 across 38 Group B (NG) and Group C posts in various departments. The number is tentative and may increase or decrease at the sole discretion of the A&N Administration.

faq.question: What is the application fee for A&N Administration CHSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Male candidates from General, OBC, and EWS categories are required to pay Rs. 100/- (Rupees One Hundred Only) through Net Banking, VISA/Master/Rupay/Credit/Debit Card, or UPI Payment/QR Code. Female candidates, ST candidates, and Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) are fully exempted from payment of the examination fee. The fee once paid is non-refundable.

faq.question: What is the minimum educational qualification required for A&N Administration CHSL 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for most posts is 12th Pass (Senior Secondary Certificate - Class XII) from a recognized Board or University. However, some specialized posts require additional qualifications such as ITI/Diploma (Forester, Mechanical Foreman), specific Certificates of Competency (Master 1st Class, Chief Engine Driver, Marine Radio Operator), or Diploma in Computer Engineering (IT Analyst, Computer Assistant Gr.-A'). Candidates should check post-specific eligibility before applying.
